title: 工具执行失败: read_file
content:
--- 文件: core/compression_engine.py (第 520 至 980 行，共 1554 行) ---
 520 |         return CompressionResult(
 521 |             success=True,
 522 |             strategy=CompressionStrategy.KEYFRAME,
 523 |             compressed_messages=compressed_messages,
 524 |             summary=summary,
 525 |             compression_ratio=len(compressed_messages) / len(messages) if messages else 0,
 526 |             original_count=len(messages),
 527 |             compressed_count=len(compressed_messages),
 528 |             metadata={
 529 |                 "keyframe_count": len(compressed_messages),
 530 |                 "selected_turn_ids": list(selected_ids),
 531 |                 "selected_categories": selected_categories,
 532 |                 "avg_turn_importance": avg_importance,
 533 |                 "user_messages": sum(1 for msg in compressed_messages if msg.get("role") == "user"),
 534 |                 "error_messages": sum(1 for turn in selected_turns if "error" in turn.categories),
 535 |                 "tool_messages": sum(1 for msg in compressed_messages if msg.get("role") == "tool"),
 536 |                 "files_touched": sorted({path for turn in selected_turns for path in turn.files_touched})[:20],
 537 |                 "compressed_state": compressed_state.to_dict(),
 538 |                 "compressed_state_prompt": compressed_state.render_for_prompt(),
 539 |             },
 540 |             compressed_state=compressed_state
 541 |         )
 542 | 
 543 |     # ========== 策略 3: 滑动窗口 ==========
 544 | 
 545 |     def _compress_with_sliding_window(
 546 |         self,
 547 |         messages: List[Dict[str, Any]],
 548 |         target_ratio: float,
 549 |         min_keep: int
 550 |     ) -> CompressionResult:
 551 |         """
 552 |         滑动窗口保留最近消息
 553 | 
 554 |         策略：
 555 |         1. 保留最近 target_ratio 比例的消息
 556 |         2. 确保不截断工具调用（重要修复）
 557 |         3. 至少保留 min_keep 条消息
 558 | 
 559 |         Args:
 560 |             messages: 消息列表
 561 |             target_ratio: 目标压缩比
 562 |             min_keep: 最少保留的消息数量
 563 | 
 564 |         Returns:
 565 |             CompressionResult
 566 |         """
 567 |         target_count = max(min_keep, int(len(messages) * target_ratio))
 568 |         compressed_messages = self._select_recent_complete_turn_messages(messages, target_count)
 569 | 
 570 |         if len(compressed_messages) < min_keep and len(messages) <= min_keep:
 571 |             compressed_messages = self._sanitize_openai_tool_pairs(messages[:])
 572 | 
 573 |         print(f"   [滑动窗口] 保留最近 {len(compressed_messages)} 条消息（基于完整 turn）")
 574 | 
 575 |         # 🔥 关键验证：检查最终的消息序列是否有效
 576 |         is_valid = self._validate_message_ordering(compressed_messages)
 577 |         if not is_valid:
 578 |             print(f"   ⚠️  警告: 压缩后的消息序列无效，执行安全清理")
 579 |             compressed_messages = self._sanitize_openai_tool_pairs(compressed_messages)
 580 | 
 581 |         # 生成简化版摘要
 582 |         sliding_turns = TurnBuilder().complete_turns_only(TurnBuilder().build(compressed_messages))
 583 |         compressed_state = self._extract_compressed_state(sliding_turns)
 584 |         summary = self._generate_summary_from_messages(
 585 |             compressed_messages, CompressionStrategy.SLIDING_WINDOW, 0.5, compressed_state
 586 |         )
 587 | 
 588 |         return CompressionResult(
 589 |             success=True,
 590 |             strategy=CompressionStrategy.SLIDING_WINDOW,
 591 |             compressed_messages=compressed_messages,
 592 |             summary=summary,
 593 |             compression_ratio=len(compressed_messages) / len(messages) if messages else 0,
 594 |             original_count=len(messages),
 595 |             compressed_count=len(compressed_messages),
 596 |             metadata={
 597 |                 "window_size": len(compressed_messages),
 598 |                 "compressed_state": compressed_state.to_dict(),
 599 |                 "compressed_state_prompt": c...
